import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

// Rule 2: Holder is declared in this file; LOG's declared type resolves via
// import to org.slf4j.Logger, so Holder.LOG.error(...) is a tier-1 capture.
class HolderStaticLogger {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Holder.LOG.error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}

class Holder {
    static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(Holder.class);
}
